search.emptyHint: Copy some text to get started

detail.emptyTitle: Copy some text to get started
detail.emptySubtitle: Content type will be detected automatically with recommended actions
detail.thinkingTooltipOn: Deep thinking mode enabled, click to switch to fast mode
detail.thinkingTooltipOff: Fast mode enabled, click to switch to deep thinking mode
detail.customPlaceholder: Enter your request, e.g.: translate to Japanese, extract keywords…
detail.filePreviewTruncated: Showing the beginning of the file only
detail.longTextTruncated: This content is long, so only the first portion is rendered by default. About {{n}} more lines are hidden.

settings.title: Settings
settings.toggleDetailPanelShortcutDesc: Press this while the panel is open to show or hide the right-side detail pane
settings.aiModelDesc: Supports OpenAI-compatible APIs (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama, etc.)
settings.fillRequired: Please fill in Base URL and Model Name
settings.dataManagementDesc: Clear unpinned history records. Pinned records will not be deleted.
settings.clearBySizeDesc: Delete unpinned text records whose content exceeds a size threshold, to prevent huge log pastes from lingering in history.
settings.sizeThresholdInvalid: Please enter a threshold greater than 0
settings.quickActionsDesc: Configure global shortcuts to execute actions directly without opening the panel
settings.noQuickActions: No quick actions yet. Click the button above to add one.
settings.quickActionSaved: Quick action saved. Restart to take effect.
settings.guideIntro: This page summarizes the main usage flow so it's easy to get started or revisit later.
settings.guideBasicsDesc: The core flow is: copy content, let ClipBrain detect it, then run the suggested action.
settings.guideBasicsBullet1: After copying text, ClipBrain detects JSON, YAML, URLs, code, tables, and other common content types automatically.
settings.guideBasicsBullet2: Use the global shortcut Option + Command + C to open the main panel anytime.
settings.guideBasicsBullet3: After an action runs, you can copy the result directly or revisit it later from history.
settings.guideModesDesc: Rules Only is enabled by default. Configure a model later if you want AI-powered actions.
settings.guideModesBullet1: Rules Only works offline and is great for JSON formatting, YAML cleanup, URL parsing, and similar tasks.
settings.guideModesBullet2: Remote AI supports translation, summarization, polishing, and code explanation after you configure a model in the AI tab.
settings.guideModesBullet3: If privacy and offline usage matter most, you can connect a local model setup to expand capabilities.
settings.guideEfficiencyDesc: A few small settings can reduce friction and keep common actions one step away.
settings.guideEfficiencyBullet1: In Shortcuts, bind global hotkeys for frequent actions so you can run formatting or translation directly.
settings.guideEfficiencyBullet2: Turn on the search bar shortcuts to jump to the Plugin Store and Action Statistics faster.
settings.guideEfficiencyBullet3: Use the Plugin Store to add new actions, and use History to search and reuse past clipboard content.
settings.autoStartDesc: Start ClipBrain automatically after you sign in. Off by default.
settings.showDetailPanelByDefault: Show the detail pane by default when the panel opens
settings.showDetailPanelByDefaultDesc: Turn this off to hide the right-side detail pane by default and keep only the top bar plus the history list. While the panel is open, press Shift + Tab at any time to toggle the right-side detail pane.
settings.showItemMeta: Show source app and time in list items
settings.showItemMetaDesc: When enabled, each item shows the source app name and copy time below the content
settings.clearInputsOnPanelOpen: Clear input boxes each time the panel opens
settings.clearInputsOnPanelOpenDesc: When enabled, the top search box and the right-side detail input will be cleared whenever the panel is shown.
settings.searchToolbarShowActions: Show Plugin Store and Action Statistics beside the search box
settings.searchToolbarDesc: Hidden by default. Turn this on to show both shortcuts on the right side of the history search box.
settings.noConfigs: No model configs yet. Click the button above to add one.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: ClipBrain is your smart clipboard assistant. Copy any text and it will automatically detect the content type and suggest the best actions.
onboarding.feature1: Auto-detect JSON, YAML, URL, code, tables, and more
onboarding.feature2: One-click formatting, translation, summarization, code explanation
onboarding.clipboardAccessDesc: ClipBrain reads clipboard content to detect and process text. All data is processed locally.
onboarding.accessibilityDesc: On macOS, accessibility permission is used for automatic paste and to detect the active application for privacy exclusions.
onboarding.modeHint: This page only shows the available modes. Actual switching happens in Settings.
onboarding.modeSettingsHint: Rules Only is enabled by default for first use, so you don't need to choose now.
onboarding.rulesOnlyDesc: Built-in rules for JSON, YAML, URL formatting — no network required
onboarding.remoteApiDesc: Connect to OpenAI-compatible APIs for translation, summarization, code explanation
onboarding.localModelDesc: Local AI models (llama.cpp / MLX) — fully offline and private
onboarding.doneDesc: Everything is configured. Try copying some JSON or any text — ClipBrain will detect the type and suggest actions.

stats.title: Action Statistics
stats.totalActionsDesc: Total number of AI actions executed (translate, summarize, format, etc.)
stats.timeSavedDesc: Total processing time of all AI actions, representing time AI spent completing tasks for you
stats.topActionsDesc: Top 10 actions ranked by usage count
stats.dailyTrendDesc: Daily action count distribution over the last 30 days
stats.noData: No data yet. Execute some actions and stats will appear here.
